title: Opening for Production Engineer at Himalaya Drug Company

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Himalaya Drug Company
jsonLd.description:
Himalaya Drug Company has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Himalaya Drug Company:
Himalaya Drug Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company!
